scripts.dev: concurrently -n NODE,ANGULAR,IC -c blue,green,yellow "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm start" "cd intelligence && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.dev:react: concurrently -n NODE,REACT -c blue,cyan "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend-react && npm start"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npx ng build --configuration production
scripts.build:react: cd frontend-react && npm install && npm run build
